title: oxalis vulgaris
intro: Oxalis vulgaris, also known as the common wood sorrel, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the wood sorrel family. The plant contains oxalic acid, which has been used for its medicinal properties, including treating skin conditions and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Oxalis vulgaris include reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Oxalis vulgaris can be made into teas, salves, and tinctures, and are often used to soothe sore throats and mouth ulcers.
